moments.title: The Hundred 2026 Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The 100-ball cricket tournament, The Hundred, launched its sixth season yesterday and continues with matches across the UK, featuring new team names and increased overseas player limits.

angles.name: Tournament Wide
angles.copy: The Hundred is back! The 100-ball cricket tournament is in full swing across the UK. Which team are you backing for glory this year?

angles.name: Welsh Fire Focus
angles.copy: Our very own Welsh Fire are battling it out in The Hundred! Catch them in action this week and cheer on the Welsh contingent.

angles.name: New Rules & Teams
angles.copy: New season, new rules! The Hundred 2026 has rebranded teams and more international talent. Is this the year your team lifts the trophy?

moments.title: Commonwealth Games 2026 Begin
moments.blurb: Glasgow is set to host the Commonwealth Games 2026, with over 3,000 athletes from 74 nations and territories competing across 11 days, starting tomorrow.

angles.name: Opening Excitement
angles.copy: The Commonwealth Games kick off in Glasgow tomorrow! Get ready for 11 days of incredible sport and inspiring athletes.

angles.name: Scotland Hosting
angles.copy: Glasgow is on the world stage! The Commonwealth Games begin tomorrow right here in Scotland. Who are you most excited to watch?

angles.name: Team UK Support
angles.copy: Over 3,000 athletes are heading to Glasgow for the Commonwealth Games. Let's get behind Team UK!

moments.title: Latitude Festival Returns
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival is back at Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23rd to 26th, celebrating its 20th anniversary with music, comedy, arts, and more.

angles.name: Festival Kick-off
angles.copy: Latitude Festival officially opens its gates tomorrow! Who's heading to Henham Park for a weekend of music, comedy, and good vibes?

angles.name: Suffolk's Big Weekend
angles.copy: It's almost time for Suffolk's biggest party! Latitude Festival begins tomorrow – what acts are on your must-see list?

angles.name: 20 Years of Latitude
angles.copy: Celebrating 20 years of Latitude! This weekend promises to be a huge anniversary bash. What's your favourite Latitude memory?

moments.title: Bruno Mars Live in London
moments.blurb: Bruno Mars brings his highly anticipated tour to Wembley Stadium tonight, with further dates on July 24th and 25th.

angles.name: Tonight's Show
angles.copy: Bruno Mars is LIVE at Wembley Stadium tonight! If you're heading there, get ready for an unforgettable show. What's your favourite Bruno Mars track?

angles.name: Wembley Weekend
angles.copy: Bruno Mars takes over Wembley Stadium tonight and this weekend! London is buzzing. Who's got tickets?

angles.name: Hooligans Assemble
angles.copy: Get your dancing shoes ready, Hooligans! Bruno Mars is back in the UK for a run of massive shows.

moments.title: Happy 34th Birthday Selena Gomez
moments.blurb: American singer, actress, and producer Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday today.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Sending big birthday wishes to the incredible Selena Gomez, who turns 34 today! What's your all-time favourite Selena song?

angles.name: From Disney to Pop Star
angles.copy: Happy 34th Birthday to Selena Gomez! From her Disney Channel days to global pop icon, she's had quite the journey.

angles.name: Selena's Hits
angles.copy: Celebrating Selena Gomez's 34th today! We're playing some of her biggest hits. Which one gets you singing along every time?

moments.title: Mick Jagger Turns 83
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, will celebrate his 83rd birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Rock Icon Birthday
angles.copy: On July 26th, the one and only Mick Jagger turns 83! An absolute rock legend. What's your favourite Rolling Stones track?

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: 83 years young! Mick Jagger celebrates his birthday this Sunday. His energy on stage is still unmatched. What's your favourite Jagger moment?

angles.name: Stones Classics
angles.copy: Get ready to Jumpin' Jack Flash! We're celebrating Mick Jagger's upcoming 83rd birthday with some Stones classics.

moments.title: Fatboy Slim's 63rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Norman Cook, better known as Fatboy Slim, the iconic DJ and producer, will turn 63 on July 31st.

angles.name: Big Beat Birthday
angles.copy: Praise You! Fatboy Slim celebrates his 63rd birthday on July 31st. Get ready for some classic big beat tunes to celebrate.

angles.name: Right Here, Right Now
angles.copy: Norman Cook, aka Fatboy Slim, turns 63 next week! What's your go-to track for getting the party started?

angles.name: 90s Dance Legend
angles.copy: From Brighton beach to global stages, Fatboy Slim is a true legend. Wishing him a happy 63rd for the 31st!

moments.title: Summer Holidays in Full Swing
moments.blurb: School summer holidays are now in full effect across the UK, with most schools in England and Wales having broken up this week.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: The school summer holidays are officially here for most of the UK! What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: Sunshine and no school runs! The summer holidays are well underway. Share your best family-friendly activities happening near you!

angles.name: Local Summer Events
angles.copy: Devon schools are out for summer! We want to hear about your favourite local spots and events to enjoy with the kids this holiday.

moments.title: UK Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The latest Official Singles Chart sees Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' at number 1, with World Cup anthems 'Wonderwall' and 'Three Lions' making a strong showing.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: It's official: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are still at No. 1 with 'Rein Me In'! Who else is loving this track?

angles.name: World Cup Chart Impact
angles.copy: The World Cup might be over but its impact on the charts isn't! 'Wonderwall' and 'Three Lions' are both in the Top 3. What a singalong!

angles.name: New Chart Entries
angles.copy: From viral dance tracks to pop anthems, the UK Singles Chart is buzzing! Tune in to hear the biggest songs right now.

moments.title: ANOTR & 54 Ultra Rising
moments.blurb: Dutch dance duo ANOTR and 54 Ultra's 'Talk To You' is climbing the Official Singles Chart, currently at number 4, boosted by a viral John Stones World Cup clip.

angles.name: Viral Hit
angles.copy: 'Talk To You' by ANOTR & 54 Ultra is flying up the charts! That viral clip certainly helped. Are you loving this summer banger?

angles.name: Dance Floor Filler
angles.copy: Need a new track to get you moving? ANOTR & 54 Ultra are bringing the grooves with 'Talk To You', currently No. 4 in the UK!

angles.name: Summer Soundtrack
angles.copy: This track is quickly becoming THE sound of summer! 'Talk To You' by ANOTR & 54 Ultra is on heavy rotation.

moments.title: Shakira & Burna Boy's World Cup Anthem
moments.blurb: Shakira and Burna Boy's 'Dai Dai', the official 2026 FIFA World Cup anthem, is a top 5 hit on the Official Singles Chart.

angles.name: World Cup Anthem
angles.copy: The World Cup might be over, but Shakira & Burna Boy's 'Dai Dai' is still bringing the party as a Top 5 hit! What a track!

angles.name: Global Hit
angles.copy: 'Dai Dai' is still making waves on the charts! Shakira and Burna Boy absolutely delivered with this one.

angles.name: Feel Good Friday
angles.copy: It's almost the weekend, and 'Dai Dai' is the perfect soundtrack! Shakira and Burna Boy still dominating the charts.

moments.title: Beyond Paradise Filming in Devon
moments.blurb: The popular BBC drama 'Beyond Paradise' has begun filming its fifth series in Devon this month, with a new season expected in 2027.

angles.name: Devon Filming
angles.copy: Exciting news for Devon! Filming for the fifth series of 'Beyond Paradise' is now underway in our beautiful county. Keep an eye out for the cast and crew!

angles.name: Local Drama
angles.copy: Our favourite local drama is back in production! 'Beyond Paradise' Series 5 is being filmed in Devon. Are you a fan?

angles.name: Series 5 Anticipation
angles.copy: Beyond Paradise fans, get ready! Series 5 is now filming in stunning Devon, promising more mysteries and stunning scenery for 2027.

moments.title: New BBC Drama 'The Rapture'
moments.blurb: A new drama series, 'The Rapture', is set to premiere on BBC One on Sunday, July 26th at 9pm.

angles.name: New Sunday Night Drama
angles.copy: Your new Sunday night obsession? Brand new drama 'The Rapture' premieres on BBC One this Sunday at 9pm! Who's tuning in?

angles.name: BBC Must-Watch
angles.copy: Looking for a gripping new series? 'The Rapture' hits BBC One this weekend. Get ready for some Sunday night suspense!

angles.name: What's On This Weekend
angles.copy: Mark your calendars! 'The Rapture' is coming to BBC One this Sunday. What do you think it's about?

moments.title: New Reality Series 'The Princess Diaries'
moments.blurb: ITV2 is launching a new reality series, 'The Princess Diaries', on Tuesday, July 28th at 9pm.

angles.name: New Reality TV
angles.copy: Obsessed with reality TV? A brand new series, 'The Princess Diaries', starts on ITV2 next Tuesday at 9pm!

angles.name: ITV2 Buzz
angles.copy: Get ready for some drama! 'The Princess Diaries' is coming to ITV2 next week. What kind of 'princesses' do you think we'll see?

angles.name: Midweek Entertainment
angles.copy: Your Tuesday nights just got a new dose of reality! 'The Princess Diaries' premieres on ITV2 July 28th.

moments.title: Big Love Festival in South Wales
moments.blurb: The Big Love music festival is celebrating its 10th year in South Wales this July, offering a 4-day family-friendly event with 140+ bands and DJs.

angles.name: South Wales Festival
angles.copy: Big Love Festival is happening this July in South Wales! Celebrating its 10th year with incredible music and a family-friendly vibe. Who's going?

angles.name: 10 Years of Love
angles.copy: Happy 10th anniversary to Big Love Festival in South Wales! A fantastic small festival with a huge heart and even bigger lineup.

angles.name: Family Fun in Wales
angles.copy: Looking for family fun this July? Big Love Festival in South Wales has over 140 acts and activities for all ages!
